lines.text: Oh well. Guess I'll continue the search for my wife...
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Feilian Beringal, where are you... Last time, I blamed you for losing the match for your high cost... Now you refuse to fight for me...
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: But really, who else is like you? High attack, massive HP, an amazing skill set...
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Without you, my perfect deck falls apart!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige
